enforced: clang-tidy CheckOptions is a list of {key, value} entries (current clang-tidy schema) configuring identifier-naming and cppcoreguidelines checks
bugprone-*, clang-analyzer-*, cppcoreguidelines-*, performance-*, modernize-*, and readability-* check groups are machine-enforced
WarningsAsErrors escalates bugprone-* and clang-analyzer-* findings to build failures
clang-format BasedOnStyle: Google with ColumnLimit 100, SortIncludes, and BinPackArguments/Parameters: false is machine-enforced formatting
note: Exact check availability varies slightly by LLVM major version; verify with `clang-tidy --dump-config` against the target toolchain.
